creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Hi, Jan Kokemüller.

Thanks for the patches. I reviewed them and applied the following changes:
- Added http://www.warsow.net:1337 master site.
- Fixed build with Clang compiler (by patch for ui/as/asbind.h file and 
Makefile changes).
- Fixed options sub-menu crash (by patch for extracted 
basewsw/ui/porkui/tamplate.rml file).
